query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_duplicate_groups, SUM(cnt - 1) as total_records_to_remove FROM (
  SELECT cp.phoneNumber, c.propertyId, COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM contactPhones cp
  JOIN contacts c ON cp.contactId = c.id
  WHERE c.propertyId IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY cp.phoneNumber, c.propertyId
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) as dups;

  SELECT cp.phoneNumber, c.propertyId, COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM contactPhones cp
  JOIN contacts c ON cp.contactId = c.id
  WHERE c.propertyId IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY cp.phoneNumber, c.propertyId
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
